ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "transducer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transducer being calibrated */,
  "calibration_year" TEXT /* Year of the calibration */,
  "calibration_location" TEXT /* Location where the calibration was performed */,
  "equation" TEXT /* Calibration equation (e.g., y = 1.0092x + 0.0117) */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the calibration */,
  "number_of_data_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points used for the calibration */,
  "calibration_version" TEXT /* Version of the calibration data */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics and data points for performance analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_transducer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transducer_id") REFERENCES transducers ("transducer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_number_of_data_points FOREIGN KEY ("number_of_data_points") REFERENCES data_points ("number_of_data_points"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_standard_error FOREIGN KEY ("standard_error") REFERENCES calibration_standards ("standard_error_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_calibration_year FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_year") REFERENCES calibration_years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_equation FOREIGN KEY ("equation") REFERENCES calibration_equations ("equation_formula"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_calibration_location FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_location") REFERENCES calibration_locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "transducers" (
  "transducer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transducer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the transducer */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the transducer */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the transducer */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the transducer was installed */,
  "installation_location" TEXT /* Location where the transducer is installed */,
  "technical_specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the transducer */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Maintenance history of the transducer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transducer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transducers_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transducers_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES transducer_models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transducers_installation_location FOREIGN KEY ("installation_location") REFERENCES installation_sites ("site_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the calibration (e.g., 2015, 2016) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., NW, SE, SW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_equations" (
  "equation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration equation */,
  "equation_formula" TEXT /* Formula of the calibration equation (e.g., y = 1.0092x + 0.0117) */,
  "equation_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration equation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard error */,
  "standard_error_value" REAL /* Value of the standard error */,
  "standard_error_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number of data points */,
  "number_of_data_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points used for the calibration */,
  "data_point_description" TEXT /* Description of the data points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transducer_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installation_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the calibration method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_tooling" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the calibration tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "technician_email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "technician_role" TEXT /* Role of the technician (e.g., Lead Technician, Assistant Technician) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration session */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration event */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician performing the calibration */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration method used */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration tool used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the calibration session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the calibration session */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the calibration session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_sessions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES calibration_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_sessions_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES calibration_tooling ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_sessions_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES calibration_technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_sessions_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_id") REFERENCES calibration_data ("calibration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration session */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES calibration_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration history record */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration event */,
  "transducer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transducer being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the calibration data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_history_transducer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transducer_id") REFERENCES transducers ("transducer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_history_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_id") REFERENCES calibration_data ("calibration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, QA, Administrator) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Login, Calibration, Reporting) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Predefined, Custom) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_template" TEXT /* Template of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time of report creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
